event: Webhook error rate and queue depth began climbing for payroll-sync deliveries
Logs suggested the partner endpoint might be degraded because multiple outbound timeouts were recorded
Partner probe dashboards showed latency just above 2.3s but no outage, contradicting a full dependency failure theory
Recent commit review found the outbound timeout had been lowered to 2s in the deployed version
Payroll-sync deliveries resumed succeeding at roughly 2.4s and queue depth rapidly drained
